metadata.description: Short prefix used for resource naming. Lowercase, 3-8 chars.
Environment name (dev, test, stg, prod). Used in naming and tags.
Azure region for all resources.
Resource tags applied to every resource.
Azure OpenAI model deployments to create. Each entry: { name, model, version, capacity }.
Backend container image (set after first ACR build, e.g. <acr>.azurecr.io/aa-backend:<tag>).
Frontend container image (set after first ACR build, e.g. <acr>.azurecr.io/aa-frontend:<tag>).
VNet address space.
PostgreSQL admin password.
Set true to deploy Azure AI Search.
Set true to deploy Front Door fronting the frontend container app.
Email address that receives on-call alerts.
Entra ID tenant ID (single-tenant app reg lives here).
API app registration audience (client ID or api://<id> URI). Tokens issued for this audience authorise /api/* calls.
Custom domain bindings for the frontend container app. Each entry: { name, certificateId, bindingType }. Leave empty for envs that only use the default ACA FQDN.
Fernet key for at-rest secret encryption (Base64, 32 bytes). Generate once: python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())"
When false, skip creating an AOAI account and instead grant the workload MI access to an existing one referenced by existingOpenAi*.
Resource group of an existing AOAI account to share. Required when deployOpenAi=false.
Name of an existing AOAI account to share. Required when deployOpenAi=false.
Endpoint of an existing AOAI account (e.g. https://<name>.openai.azure.com/). Required when deployOpenAi=false.
When false, skip creating an ACR and instead grant the workload MI AcrPull on an existing one referenced by existingAcr*.
Resource group of an existing ACR to share. Required when deployAcr=false.
Name of an existing ACR to share. Required when deployAcr=false.
Login server (e.g. <name>.azurecr.io) of an existing ACR. Required when deployAcr=false.
VNet address space, /20 default gives ample room for the three subnets.
Create privatelink.openai.azure.com zone. Set false when AOAI is shared cross-RG — the empty zone otherwise shadows public DNS and breaks resolution.
Create privatelink.search.windows.net zone. Set false when Azure AI Search is not deployed in this VNet.
Private DNS zone ID for privatelink.vaultcore.azure.net. When non-empty along with peSubnetId, a private endpoint is created.
Subnet ID for the Key Vault private endpoint. When non-empty along with privateDnsZoneId, a private endpoint is created.
Array of { name, model, version, capacity } objects.
Private DNS zone ID for privatelink.openai.azure.com. When non-empty along with peSubnetId, a private endpoint is created.
Subnet ID for the Azure OpenAI private endpoint. When non-empty along with privateDnsZoneId, a private endpoint is created.
Subnet ID delegated to Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers.
Private DNS zone resource ID for privatelink.postgres.database.azure.com.

databaseUrl.value: [format('postgresql+asyncpg://{0}:{1}@{2}:5432/{3}?ssl=require', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'postgres'), '2025-04-01').outputs.administratorLogin.value, parameters('postgresAdminPassword'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'postgres'), '2025-04-01').outputs.serverFqdn.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'postgres'), '2025-04-01').outputs.databaseName.value)]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the Container App to monitor with the metric alerts.
Email address that receives critical alerts.
When true, public network access is disabled and a private endpoint is created.
Subnet ID for the private endpoint. Required when usePrivateEndpoint = true.
Private DNS zone ID for privatelink.search.windows.net. Required when usePrivateEndpoint = true.
true = external ingress (public), false = internal-only.
Container App secrets. Either { name, value } or KV-backed { name, keyVaultUrl, identity }. Referenced via secretRef in envVars.
Custom hostname bindings, e.g. [{ name: "example.com", certificateId: "<env-managed-cert-id>", bindingType: "SniEnabled" }].
true = external ingress (public), false = internal-only.
Container App secrets. Either { name, value } or KV-backed { name, keyVaultUrl, identity }. Referenced via secretRef in envVars.
Custom hostname bindings, e.g. [{ name: "example.com", certificateId: "<env-managed-cert-id>", bindingType: "SniEnabled" }].
Origin hostname (e.g. the public Container App FQDN, without scheme).
